Welcome to Amazing Grace Care Centre

[![AGCC Logo](https://amazinggracecarecentre.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/AGCC-Logo.png#1403)![AGCC Logo](https://amazinggracecarecentre.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/AGCC-Logo.png#1403)![AGCC Logo](https://amazinggracecarecentre.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/AGCC-Logo.png#1403)![AGCC Logo](https://amazinggracecarecentre.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/AGCC-Logo.png#1403)](https://amazinggracecarecentre.com "Amazing Grace Care Centre")

# Welcome to

# Amazing Grace Care Center

# Welcome to

# Amazing Grace Care Center

[![](https://amazinggracecarecentre.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/IMG-20251026-WA0005.png)](/#whatweoffer)

[![](https://amazinggracecarecentre.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/IMG-20251027-WA0039.png)](/#whatweoffer)

[![](https://amazinggracecarecentre.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/IMG-20251027-WA0040.png)](/#whatweoffer)

[![](https://amazinggracecarecentre.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/AG-Work1.png)](/#whatweoffer)

Recognized Among  
**the best  
**Nursing Homes in Kuala Lumpur

Amazing Grace Care Center was proudly featured by Trusted Malaysia as one of The 6 Best Nursing Homes in Kuala Lumpur.

Known for its home-like ambiance and family-oriented care, the center offers a peaceful environment where residents feel truly at home. Every space—from cozy rooms to lush outdoor areas—reflects warmth, dignity, and comfort.

What truly sets Amazing Grace Care Center apart is its dedicated team, who treat residents like family and provide attentive, hands-on support every day. This compassionate culture, combined with a clean and safe environment, makes it a trusted choice for families seeking quality, heartfelt care.

[Read more](https://www.trustedmalaysia.com/best-nursing-homes-kuala-lumpur)

![](https://amazinggracecarecentre.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/IMG-20250830-WA1082.jpg)

Our Offer

*   Home Nursing (Care Giver Services) — clinical care in the comfort of one’s home
*   Nursing Home / Residential Care — 24/7 supervision, daily living support, rehabilitation
*   Ambulance & Medical Transport — prompt, safe, medically equipped patient transfers
*   Short-term & long-term care options — flexible duration to suit recovery or ongoing needs
*   Personalised care plans — adjusted to each resident’s condition, preferences, and schedule

![IMG-20250830-WA1082](https://amazinggracecarecentre.com/wp-content/uploads/elementor/thumbs/IMG-20250830-WA1082-rdksx5anwmlb8qlpsq4yplzcttdas873n9vf0l5ytg.jpg "IMG-20250830-WA1082")

What We Offer

![](https://amazinggracecarecentre.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/IMG-20251026-WA0005.png)

## Ambulance services

*   Medically equipped vehicle
*   Trained paramedic escorts
*   Emergency response & stabilisation
*   Hospital \* Home \* Facility Transfers

![](https://amazinggracecarecentre.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/IMG-20251027-WA0039.png)

## emergency team

*   Rapid on-site medical support
*   On-site support for homes & facilities
*   Professional, trained responders
*   Safe and immediate assistance

![](https://amazinggracecarecentre.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/IMG-20251027-WA0040.png)

## Home care | Given & Nursing

*   Wound care, injections & medication administration
*   Post-operative monitoring & recovery support
*   Daily living assistance (meals, hygiene, mobility)
*   Chronic disease & long-term care support (stroke, dementia, diabetes)

![](https://amazinggracecarecentre.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/AG-Work1.png)

## Amazing Grace @ Work

*   Corporate CSR collaboration & volunteer programmes
*   Elderly outreach, visitation & community support
*   Health awareness & educational initiatives

[![](https://amazinggracecarecentre.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/icons8-hospital-100.png)](https://amazinggracecarecentre.com/center/)

##### [Home Nursing  
(Care Taker Services)](https://amazinggracecarecentre.com/center/)

Skilled caretakers provide professional nursing care in the comfort of your home — from wound care and medication support to post-surgery recovery and elderly care.

[![](https://amazinggracecarecentre.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/icons8-home-100.png)](https://amazinggracecarecentre.com/contact/)

##### [Nursing Home Care](https://amazinggracecarecentre.com/contact/)

A warm, safe, and fully equipped environment offering 24-hour nursing supervision, rehabilitation programs, and personalized daily care for long-term or short-term stays.

[![](https://amazinggracecarecentre.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/icons8-ambulance-96.png)](https://amazinggracecarecentre.com/questionsanswers/)

##### [Ambulance & Medical Transport](https://amazinggracecarecentre.com/questionsanswers/)

Reliable ambulance services with trained medical staff for emergency response, hospital transfers, or scheduled transport — ensuring safe and timely care on the move.

![IMG-20250917-WA0782](https://amazinggracecarecentre.com/wp-content/uploads/elementor/thumbs/IMG-20250917-WA0782-rdksx91y896k3dm2q9sb9i9hs7snhijln4nc2x5efs.jpg "IMG-20250917-WA0782")

Why Choose Us

When you entrust Amazing Grace Care Center with the care of yourself or your loved ones, you are choosing more than a service — you are choosing:

*   Compassionate & Person-Centred Care
*   Highly Skilled & Licensed Professionals
*   Peace of Mind
*   Rapid, Reliable Response
*   Safety, Quality & Compliance

Here’s what makes us different:

### Family-Centred Care

We nurture a warm, homely atmosphere where everyone belongs.

### Professional & Personalized Support

Our caregivers and nurses provide attentive care tailored to individual needs.

### Comfort & Dignity

Every aspect of our environment is designed to ensure peace, respect, and joy.

### Faith - Value to cross

Guided by grace, we serve with kindness, patience, and purpose.

### Comprehensive Services

From residential care and home nursing to medical transport, we provide continuity of care under one trusted name.

At Amazing Grace, we don’t just care for people & staff — we care about them.

What Our Clients Say About Us

[Why Choose Us?](/why_choose_us)
